title: language-meta interop tree and GC platform alignment

source.subject: docs: language-meta interop tree and GC platform alignment

body:
## Outcome

Language-meta interop tree and GC platform alignment.

## Context

- Workstream **platform-spec** — normative spec on beskid-lang.org.
- **abfall** is vendored for Beskid heap/GC integration; platform-spec GC chapters track runtime alignment.

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`abd197e`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/abd197e) — docs: language-meta interop tree and GC platform alignment
